policy: This repo documents coding-related tools and MCP servers. Install tools only when the project needs them and after reviewing trust, permissions, and credentials.

local_tools.name: code-review-graph
local_tools.treatment: bundled skill plus optional local tool or MCP
local_tools.use: Graph-backed code review, impact analysis, ownership mapping, and compact codebase context

local_tools.name: context7-cli
local_tools.use: Current documentation lookup for libraries, frameworks, SDKs, APIs, CLIs, and cloud services

local_tools.name: supabase CLI
local_tools.use: Supabase migrations, schema work, auth, storage, local development, and remote project operations

local_tools.name: markitdown
local_tools.use: Convert documents and web-like inputs into Markdown for review, ingestion, and documentation workflows

local_tools.name: n8n-mcp
local_tools.use: n8n node discovery, node validation, workflow validation, template search, and optional n8n API operations

local_tools.name: Understand Anything
local_tools.use: Codebase graph creation, codebase Q&A, diffs, onboarding guides, and file or flow explanations

mcp_servers.name: context7
mcp_servers.use: Current library, framework, SDK, CLI, and cloud-service documentation

mcp_servers.name: chrome-devtools
mcp_servers.use: Chrome DevTools diagnostics, frontend debugging, console/network checks, screenshots, traces, and performance inspection

mcp_servers.name: openaiDeveloperDocs
mcp_servers.use: Official OpenAI developer documentation for APIs, Agents SDK, ChatGPT Apps, and platform docs

mcp_servers.name: code-review-graph
mcp_servers.use: Graph-backed code review, impact analysis, ownership mapping, and compact codebase context

mcp_servers.name: node_repl
mcp_servers.use: Persistent JavaScript runtime for browser and automation workflows

mcp_servers.name: n8n
mcp_servers.use: n8n workflow validation, node lookup, and workflow template search

mcp_servers.name: supabase
mcp_servers.use: Supabase docs, account, database, functions, branching, storage, and development operations

mcp_servers.name: vercel
mcp_servers.use: Vercel docs, projects, deployments, build logs, protected URLs, and deployment tooling
